hero.name: ANANY SAXENA
hero.description: I'm a passionate 3D Generalist focused on game-ready topology, lookdev, and cinematic lighting. Skilled in high/low poly modeling, rigging, texturing, UV efficiency, and game environment art.

paragraphs: My passion lies in crafting highly detailed props, stylized and realistic characters, and immersive architectural spaces. I approach every mesh with a strong sense of composition, color theory, and visual storytelling—ensuring that every digital sculpt carries organic depth and emotional weight.

Bridging professional DCC suites (Blender, ZBrush, Maya) with industry-leading lookdev toolkits, I focus on delivering clean topology, optimal UV mapping, and high-fidelity PBR texturing. With over 3 years of 3D modeling and lighting exploration (including 1.8+ years of dedicated studio experience), I strive to create assets that are as technically efficient as they are visually arresting.

showreel.title: Interactive Showreel
showreel.description: Experience my animations, industrial walkthroughs, and rendering configurations in motion.

items.title: 3D Designer
bullets: Creating lightweight, game-ready 3D assets for real-time web-based configurators (GLB/Three.js) focusing on clean topology.
Designing modular asset systems and material setups, enabling seamless real-time customization and configurations.
Collaborating with cross-functional development teams to enforce visual benchmarks and web engine efficiency.
Transitioned from freelance to full-time role based on consistent delivery and production reliability.

items.title: 3D Designer
bullets: Delivered optimized production-ready clothing assets for an interactive web apparel configurator.
Established asset pipeline workflows, including modelling, UV mapping, texturing, and export for real-time applications.
Defined visual quality benchmarks and optimisation standards for scalable asset production.

items.title: Freelance 3D Artist
bullets: Built massive, accurate industrial environment layouts, offshore rigs, and city architecture visualized in real-time.
Modelled and animated industrial and mechanical props with operational precision and clean quad structures.
Assembled scenes and handled lighting inside Unreal Engine, assuring tight performance budgets.
Contributed to real-time visualisation workflows for industrial simulations.

items.title: Freelance 3D Artist
bullets: Created highly detailed industrial safety walkthroughs, layout simulations, and timeline animations.
Rendered interactive visual guides inside Blender, iClone, and Twinmotion for protocol visualizer tools.
Executed character animation, scene layout, lighting, and rendering for production outputs.

items.title: Freelance 3D Artist
bullets: Created architectural and industrial environment assets, including factory elevations.
Handled end-to-end asset development: modelling, UV mapping, texturing, lighting, and rendering.
Produced animated walkthroughs with attention to scale, composition, and realism.

items.title: 3D Generalist
bullets: Engineered low-poly assets (props, customized vehicles) through a modern PBR workflow in Unity environment (Including Internship Experience from May 2023 to August 2023).
Optimized animations and rigging pipelines between Blender → CC4 → Unity, lowering baking footprint.
Used Marmoset Toolbag & Substance Designer for baking, material creation, and look development.
Improved asset workflows from Blender → CC4 → Engine, ensuring performance and visual quality.
Learned props-for-gameplay designs, maintaining extreme silhouette details at lower resolution texture maps.

items.title: 3D Generalist
bullets: Created game and marketing assets for real-time and cinematic applications.
Worked across modelling, texturing, animation, and FX using Blender, Maya, and Unity.
Built previsualisation scenes using proxy meshes for rapid concept validation.
Improved asset quality through topology optimisation and efficient texturing workflows.

items.title: CGMA – Props for Gameplay
bullets: Learned to design and create optimized, game-ready props with strong silhouette, function, and storytelling for real-time game engines.
Gained hands-on experience in UV unwrapping, baking, and texture painting using industry-standard tools like Maya, Substance Painter, and Marmoset Toolbag.

items.title: Udemy – 3D Video Game Environment Art Bootcamp
bullets: Built immersive game environments using strong blockouts, composition, and lighting techniques in Unreal Engine 5, leveraging Lumen for real-time rendering.
Created high-quality props using photogrammetry and Zbrush, and enhanced scene presentation with decals and portfolio-ready workflows.

items.title: Renegade – Comprehensive / Degree Project
bullets: Learned Script Writing and Direction for Games.
Created Game props and interior environment for the project.
Learned the animation.
Created multiple assets while learning UDIM workflows used in games for detailed texturing at low resolution.

items.title: Bachelor of Science – Animation and Multimedia

bullets: GPA: 8.930 CGPA

Creative 3D designer for TechVibes stage.

contact.description: Have an upcoming game pipeline, architectural lookdev project, web configurator setup, or general freelance assignment? Let's connect and review details.
